top_signals.title: US Imposes Sanctions on Iran Exchange House, Shadow Fleet
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration on Tuesday imposed sanctions on an Iranian foreign currency exchange house and what it said were front companies overseeing transactions on behalf of Iranian banks as the U.S. maintains pressure on Tehran.The move came…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The AI economy is rewriting the American Dream — and blue-collar workers are poised to win
top_signals.summary: AI-driven hiring slowdowns are hitting some entry-level jobs for college graduates as companies like Ford and AT&T ramp up recruiting for skilled trade workers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Graphite One secures site for Alaska-Ohio supply chain
top_signals.summary: The company’s flagship Graphite Creek project in Alaska is described by the US Geological Survey as the largest graphite deposit in the country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
